title: Blog Refinement: Tags, Content HTML, and Published Date
description: Add tag support in schemas, implement tag sync in service, handle publication date on status change, and audit user relationship loading across all models.
acceptance_criteria: BlogPostCreate and BlogPostUpdate schemas include 'tags: List[str]'
BlogService.create_post syncs tags (creates missing ones, links to post)
BlogService.update_post syncs tags (adds new, removes old links)
BlogService.update_post sets published_at = now() when status transitions to PUBLISHED
Audit of all models with user_id completed; eager loading confirmed for necessary relationships (e.g. BlogPost.author)
Local linting and type checking passed (ruff, mypy)
